name: Liang

skills.name: Power Word - Trance
skills.description: Every second hit on the same target within a short time will deal an extra strike of damage.

skills.name: Power Word - Barrier
skills.description: Summons 4 barriers that shatter when touched by an enemy, inflicting damage, stun, and slow. Damage and slowing effects are reduced for enemies that touch multiple barriers.

skills.name: Power Word - Fate
skills.description: Summons a magic circle that deals damage to enemies within range while granting vision of the area. Liang gains Movement Speed while inside his magic circle.

skills.name: Power Word - Control
skills.description: Suppresses an enemy hero, dealing damage over time. When the suppression is complete, deals damage and stun enemies in range.

tips: Liang (Mage): Tier S+ on international ranked — 51.46% WR.
Build core: Knowledge Gem, Lightfoot Shoes, Boots of Deftness.

patchHistory.change: Camp HOK — WR 51.46%, pick 0.76%, ban 5.05%, popularity tier S+.
Counters Han Xin, Lam, Mulan · Weak into Li Xin, Mayene, Mulan.

faqs.question: Is Liang good in current season?
faqs.answer: Liang is Tier S+ Mage with 51.46% win rate, 0.76% pick rate, and 5.05% ban rate on the international server (Camp HOK).

faqs.question: What is the best Liang build?
faqs.answer: Recommended item path: Knowledge Gem, Lightfoot Shoes, Boots of Deftness, Guardian, Guardian - Redemption, Holy Grail. Spells and Arcana are listed on this page.

faqs.question: How to counter Liang?
faqs.answer: Strong picks into Liang: Li Xin, Mayene, Mulan. Liang is strong into Han Xin, Lam, Mulan.

metaAnalysis: Counters: Han Xin, Lam, Mulan. Countered by: Li Xin, Mayene, Mulan.
